features: confidence gating: MEDIUM+ on ML/RL, score>=99 on totals
meta.note_detail: Pooled multi-season backtest. SBR closing lines 2018-19, community-scraped DK lines 2021 through 2025-08-16, live OddsCache replay after. Headline ROI -0.60% on 14531 bets over 13665 games.

note: Real multi-season backtest (2018+2019+2021+2022+2023+2024+2025+2026). 14531 bets, -0.60% ROI. Model does not currently have edge vs. closing lines - do not use live until recalibration.
